title: Computer Hardware
subject: Computer Science
learning_objectives: Differentiate RAM and ROM memory units.

key_vocabulary.definition: The physical components of a computer.

content.text: 1. The Core Essence of Computer Hardware
Hardware refers to the tangible components of a computing unit that can be seen and handled.
Academic Standard: Vetted by HMG Academy concepts curriculum experts to ensure seamless compatibility with national secondary requirements.

content.question: Which memory is volatile (cleared on power loss)?
content.explanation: RAM (Random Access Memory) is volatile temporary storage.

questions.question: Which of these is an input device?
Where is the BIOS firmware stored?
What type of storage is an SSD?
Which component does the actual mathematical processing?
What is the resolution of a monitor measured in?
